flood_zone.label: FEMA Flood Zone AE
flood_zone.description: High-risk flood zone. Houston averages a major flood event every 2-3 years.

crime.description: Property crime rate 15% above national average.

earthquake.label: Seismic Zone
earthquake.description: Near active fault lines. Earthquake damage not covered by standard policies.

wildfire.description: Within 15 miles of high wildfire risk zones.

crime.description: Property crime rate 40% above national average.

flood_zone.description: Coastal flood zone with frequent tidal and storm flooding.

hurricane.label: Direct Hurricane Path
hurricane.description: One of the highest hurricane risk zones in the continental US.

crime.label: Moderate Crime Area

winter_storm.label: Severe Winter Weather
winter_storm.description: Heavy snowfall and ice storms can force multi-day closures.

flood_zone.description: Areas prone to urban flooding during heavy rainfall.

crime.label: High Crime Area

extreme_heat.label: Extreme Heat Zone
extreme_heat.description: Temperatures regularly exceed 110°F. HVAC failure can force closure.

dust_storm.label: Haboob Risk
dust_storm.description: Dust storms can damage signage, vehicles, and HVAC systems.
